personas.name: Sarah Chen
personas.primaryGoal: Start-of-shift visibility — know the full exception queue in 2 minutes, re-prioritize agents, escalate anything aged
painPoints: Wastes 20–30 min at shift start scanning inboxes
Never sure if night shift handled critical items
No easy way to see what's aged without digging through Outlook
typicalUtterances: How many open tasks do we have?
personas.successLooksLike: Opens Teams, asks FreightBot for briefing, gets full picture in seconds, assigns tasks to Alex and Marcus

personas.name: Alex Rodriguez
personas.primaryGoal: Work exceptions efficiently from Planner rather than hunting through inbox — resolve tasks, communicate with forwarders, close loop
painPoints: Loses track of which bookings have open queries
Unclear ownership when multiple agents share an inbox
Forgets to follow up after going into meetings
typicalUtterances: What's my task list right now?
personas.successLooksLike: Starts day from Planner task list, uses FreightBot to search by booking ID, marks tasks complete after resolving with forwarder

personas.name: Marcus Webb
personas.primaryGoal: Monitor for urgent overnight exceptions from APAC forwarders, hand off cleanly to day shift
painPoints: APAC forwarders send high volumes overnight when EU/US teams are offline
Hard to judge urgency without context — misses penalty-risk items
Handoff notes are ad hoc and often incomplete
typicalUtterances: What came in from Geodis or DB Schenker?
What do I need to hand off to day shift?
personas.successLooksLike: Uses FreightBot at start of night shift to get APAC exception list, handles what he can, leaves aged/critical ones flagged for Sarah in the morning

personas.name: James Liu
personas.primaryGoal: Spot-check exception volume trends, understand root causes, report upward on on-time performance risk
painPoints: No consolidated view of exception patterns across forwarders
Can't easily quantify the impact of missed responses
Relies on ad hoc spreadsheets from team leads
typicalUtterances: How many exceptions were opened this week?
Which forwarder is causing the most exceptions?
personas.note: Phase 1 — FreightBot will deflect detailed analytics to Phase 2 Power BI. In Phase 1, can only show current open task counts.
personas.successLooksLike: Phase 2: reviews weekly exception report in Power BI generated from Planner data
